particulars.description: The debenture by the company including fixed and floating legal mortgages over the whole assets of the company in favour of lloyds bank PLC.. The debenture includes a fixed charge over the undertaking and all property and assets of the company both present and future including all property and all other property and assets identified in clause 4.1 of the instrument.

Omnibus guarantee and set-off agreement (“ogsa”) between the company, various other companies and lloyds bank PLC (the “bank”). The ogsa provides for each of the companies to guarantee all monies and liabilities at any time due owing or incurred from or by each of the other companies to the bank at any time to combine or consolidate all or any of the companies bank accounts and transfer all or any sums standing to the credit of such bank accounts in or towards satisfaction of all or any of the companies liabilities in the bank. The bank has security over the principals’ liabilities (defined within the instrument) and all other money and liabilities whether actual or contingent now or at any time hereafter due, owing or incurred from or by the companies identified in schedule 1 of the instrument. The company with full title guarantee herby charges its credit balances (defined within the instrument) to the bank to secure repayment of the secured obligations (defined within the instrument).
